techTree.title: Reactor Research
techTree.subtitle: Unified progression
techTree.focus: All upgrades available; optimal builds follow layout and thermodynamics.

objectives.title: Place your first Cell in the reactor by opening the Parts panel
objectives.flavor_text: The first component is online. The foundation of your reactor is set.

objectives.title: Sell all your power by clicking 'Power'
objectives.flavor_text: Your first sale. The grid is now connected to your output.

objectives.title: Reduce your Heat to 0 by clicking 'Heat'
objectives.flavor_text: Managing thermal output is critical. Venting heat is the first step to a stable core.

objectives.title: Put a Heat Vent next to a Cell
objectives.flavor_text: Component placement is key. Adjacency can dramatically improve efficiency.

objectives.title: Purchase an Upgrade
objectives.flavor_text: Time to invest in efficiency. Upgrades are the path to greater output.

objectives.title: Purchase a Dual Cell
objectives.flavor_text: Double the fission, double the power. A straightforward upgrade to your core.

objectives.title: Have at least 10 Cells
objectives.flavor_text: From a single cell to a small field. Your reactor's potential is growing.

objectives.title: Purchase a Perpetual Cell upgrade
objectives.flavor_text: This upgrade eliminates the need for cell replacement, ensuring constant output.

objectives.title: Purchase a Capacitor
objectives.flavor_text: Power storage is now possible. Capacitors let you buffer energy for larger sales.

objectives.title: Complete Chapter 1: First Fission
objectives.flavor_text: You've mastered the fundamentals of reactor operation. Now, it's time to scale up.

objectives.title: Generate at least 200 power per tick
objectives.flavor_text: You are now a net energy producer, consistently supplying the grid.

objectives.title: Purchase an Improved Chronometers upgrade
objectives.flavor_text: Precision timing increases efficiency. Every tick now counts for more.

objectives.title: Have 5 different kinds of components
objectives.flavor_text: A complex machine requires diverse parts. Your reactor design is becoming more sophisticated.

objectives.title: Have at least 10 Capacitors
objectives.flavor_text: Your energy storage capacity has significantly increased, allowing for greater strategic control.

objectives.title: Generate at least 500 power per tick
objectives.flavor_text: Your reactor is now a significant power source on the grid.

objectives.title: Upgrade Potent Uranium Cell to level 3 or higher
objectives.flavor_text: Component specialization is paying off. This cell now operates far beyond its base specifications.

objectives.title: Auto-sell at least 500 power per tick
objectives.flavor_text: Automation is online. Your surplus energy is now sold automatically, ensuring constant revenue.

objectives.title: Achieve a steady power generation of 1,000 per tick for at least 30 ticks.
objectives.flavor_text: Stability is proof of a well-designed system. You're maintaining a high, steady output.

objectives.title: Have at least 10 active Advanced Capacitors and 10 Advanced Heat Vents.
objectives.flavor_text: Advanced components are online, allowing you to handle much greater power and heat loads.

objectives.title: Complete Chapter 2: Scaling Production
objectives.flavor_text: Automation and efficiency are now core to your operation. But there is always room to grow.

objectives.title: Have at least 5 Quad Plutonium Cells
objectives.flavor_text: You've unlocked a more potent, and volatile, fuel source. Plutonium offers greater rewards at a greater risk.

objectives.title: Achieve a passive income of $50,000 per tick through auto-selling.
objectives.flavor_text: Your facility is now a major economic engine, generating immense profit.

objectives.title: Generate at least 10,000 power per tick
objectives.flavor_text: Your reactor has reached a new tier of output, sustaining massive energy production.

objectives.title: Have at least 5 Quad Thorium Cells.
objectives.flavor_text: A new fuel source is available. Thorium provides a significant leap in energy potential.

objectives.title: Reach a balance of $1,000,000,000.
objectives.flavor_text: You're no longer just running a reactor; you're at the helm of a financial empire.

objectives.title: Have at least $10,000,000,000
objectives.flavor_text: Your financial reserves have reached a new order of magnitude.

objectives.title: Have at least 5 Quad Seaborgium Cells.
objectives.flavor_text: This synthetic element pushes the boundaries of physics, offering unprecedented energy density.

objectives.title: Sustain a reactor heat level above 10,000,000 for 30 ticks without a meltdown.
objectives.flavor_text: You've demonstrated mastery over extreme heat management, a dangerous but rewarding feat.

objectives.title: Generate 10 Exotic Particles
objectives.flavor_text: Immense energy concentrations are producing something new... Exotic Particles have been discovered.

objectives.title: Complete Chapter 3: High-Energy Systems
objectives.flavor_text: You've pushed conventional technology to its limit. To progress, you must embrace the exotic.

objectives.title: Generate 51 Exotic Particles
objectives.flavor_text: A sufficient quantity of exotic matter has been collected to begin meaningful research.

objectives.title: Generate 250 Exotic Particles.
objectives.flavor_text: Your stockpile of Exotic Particles is growing, unlocking new research possibilities.

objectives.title: Purchase the 'Infused Cells' and 'Unleashed Cells' experimental upgrades.
objectives.flavor_text: Applying exotic matter to existing components has created something far greater than the sum of its parts.

objectives.title: Reboot your reactor in the Research tab
objectives.flavor_text: A system reboot is required to integrate your research and apply its benefits.

objectives.title: Purchase an Experimental Upgrade
objectives.flavor_text: Research is unlocking technologies that were once thought impossible.

objectives.title: Have at least 5 Quad Dolorium Cells
objectives.flavor_text: This new cell type represents another leap forward in exotic energy generation.

objectives.title: Generate 1,000 Exotic Particles
objectives.flavor_text: Your systems are now consistently harvesting exotic matter from the quantum foam.

objectives.title: Have at least 5 Quad Nefastium Cells
objectives.flavor_text: Harnessing the power of Nefastium is a new milestone in exotic energy.

objectives.title: Place an experimental part.
objectives.flavor_text: Experimental technology doesn't just generate power; it manipulates the laws of energy production itself.

objectives.title: Complete Chapter 4: The Experimental Frontier
objectives.flavor_text: You have mastered both the atom and the quantum world. Your reactor is a monument to scientific achievement.

objectives.title: All objectives completed!
objectives.flavor_text: You have achieved the pinnacle of reactor technology. Your work is complete.

achievements.title: Not Great, Not Terrible
achievements.description: Experience your first core meltdown.

achievements.title: Unplanned Disassembly
achievements.description: Have a component explode due to over-pressurization.

achievements.title: Thermal Runaway
achievements.description: Reach criticality (200% heat) without any Vents on the grid.

achievements.title: Riding the Redline
achievements.description: Remain in repulsion (heat > 110% of max) with hull integrity above 0% for 60 consecutive ticks.

achievements.title: Critical Margin
achievements.description: Maintain reactor heat above 95% of max capacity for 120 consecutive ticks without melting down.

achievements.title: Controlled Burn
achievements.description: Maintain 100% heat capacity for 10 consecutive ticks while generating at least 500,000 Power.

achievements.title: Chain Reaction
achievements.description: Have exactly 10 components explode simultaneously on the grid in a single tick.

achievements.title: Thermal Whiplash
achievements.description: Recover from criticality (heat > 150%) back to nominal (heat < 80%) without manually clicking 'Reduce Heat'.

achievements.title: Measure Twice
achievements.description: Draft a layout in the Blueprint Planner with Net Heat ≤ 0 and > 0 Power.

achievements.title: Thermodynamic Equilibrium
achievements.description: Achieve a Net Heat of exactly 0 while generating >5,000 Power.

achievements.title: Closed Loop
achievements.description: Have a stable reactor (Net Heat ≤ 0) running with 0 Vents.

achievements.title: Unstable Equilibrium
achievements.description: Generate >5,000,000 Power per tick with exactly 0 Vents placed.

achievements.title: Sub-Compact Core
achievements.description: Generate >100,000 Power per tick on a grid of 36 tiles or fewer (6x6 size).

achievements.title: Cryogenic Fission
achievements.description: Generate >10,000 Power per tick while maintaining current reactor heat at exactly 0.

achievements.title: Thermal Capture Program
achievements.description: Generate at least 1,000 Power per tick exclusively from Stirling Generator vent upgrades.

achievements.title: Waste Heat Reclamation
achievements.description: Have a layout where your Stirling Generators produce more power than your primary fuel cells.

achievements.title: Stakhanovite Plan
achievements.description: Produce >1,000,000 Power with a total grid value under $50,000.

achievements.title: Pressure Cooker
achievements.description: Have all active Heat Exchangers on the grid at exactly 100% heat capacity simultaneously.

achievements.title: The Cold Shoulder
achievements.description: Have 4 active Heat Inlets drawing heat from a single central cell.

achievements.title: The Straitjacket
achievements.description: Place a single fuel cell surrounded by 4 check valves creating a perfect heat-locking loop.

achievements.title: Singularity Horizon
achievements.description: Place 4 Black Hole Particle Accelerators on the grid simultaneously.

achievements.title: Closed-Door Research
achievements.description: Establish your first Experimental Laboratory (purchase Level 1).

achievements.title: Protium Breeder Program
achievements.description: Have 10 active Protium Cells on the grid simultaneously.

achievements.title: Full Spectrum Reflection
achievements.description: Place 12 Thermal Neutron Reflectors on the grid simultaneously.

achievements.title: Thermionic Harvest
achievements.description: Have 15 active Thermionic Coolant Cells on the grid simultaneously.

achievements.title: Vortex Exchange
achievements.description: Have both an Extreme Heat Inlet and an Extreme Heat Outlet active on the grid.

achievements.title: Supercritical Vortex
achievements.description: Have 8 active Extreme Vents on the grid simultaneously.

achievements.title: The Protium Era
achievements.description: Generate >50,000,000 Power per tick using only Protium Cells as your power source.

achievements.title: Catalytic Synthesis
achievements.description: Reach Level 10 of the Sub-Atomic Catalysts upgrade.

achievements.title: Hawking Evaporation
achievements.description: Have a Black Hole Particle Accelerator reach at least 99% of its maximum heat capacity.

achievements.title: Unified Field Theory
achievements.description: Unlock all 9 experimental component types in your research tree.

achievements.title: Nuclear Disarmament
achievements.description: Perform an Exotic Particle Weave (Prestige) with exactly 1 active fuel cell on your grid.

achievements.title: The Perfect Weave
achievements.description: Complete an Exotic Particle Weave with session power produced and session heat dissipated within 0.1% of each other.

achievements.title: Sympathetic Resonance
achievements.description: Have a layout where a single central Reflector tile is adjacent to 4 active, fully enriched Quad Plutonium Cells.

achievements.title: Frozen Fire
achievements.description: Have a Quad Nefastium Cell running at 100% output while its local heat is kept at exactly 0.

basic_overview.title: Basic Overview
basic_overview.content:
Cells = power and heat
Power = money
Money = Bigger cells and more money
Lots of money = particle accelerators
Particle accelerators = exotic particles (EP)
EP = more upgrades and new toys for more power, heat and money!

Back up your progress: Settings → Export Save (.reactor file) for other devices or safekeeping.

parts.cells: Cells are your primary power generators. They produce both power and heat.
parts.reflectors: Reflectors boost the power output of adjacent cells.
parts.capacitors: Each capacitor placed on the reactor grid adds a fixed amount to reactor power storage.
parts.particleAccelerators: Particle Accelerators can generate Exotic Particles (EP) from contained heat; EP from accelerators is capped by the smaller of total cell power produced and total heat vented this run.
parts.vents: Vents actively cool your reactor by removing heat each tick.
parts.heatExchangers: Heat Exchangers evenly distribute heat between adjacent components.
parts.heatInlets: Heat Inlets push heat from adjacent components into the reactor.
parts.heatOutlets: Heat Outlets pull heat from the reactor into adjacent components.
parts.coolantCells: Coolant Cells passively absorb heat from adjacent components.
parts.reactorPlatings: Each reactor plating placed on the grid adds a fixed amount to reactor heat capacity.
parts.sellConsequences: Selling parts returns less when they are overheated or worn. Depleted cells sell for about $0 — plan placement carefully.

controls.autoSell: Automatically sells a portion of your power.
controls.autoBuy: Automatically replaces depleted components if you have Perpetual upgrades (Cells, Capacitors, Reflectors).
controls.heatController: Automatically reduces heat when it gets too high.
controls.pause: Pauses all reactor operations. Use this to plan changes or prevent accidents.
controls.saveExport: Settings → Export Save writes a .reactor file (or JSON fallback) to your device. Use File System Access when supported.
controls.saveImport: Settings → Import Save restores a .reactor or JSON backup. Your current slot is backed up before import.
controls.offlineCatchup: While the tab is closed, your reactor keeps progressing (deterministic offline catch-up). When you return after a long absence, use Fast-Forward to replay offline ticks through the physics worker at high speed. Unstable layouts can still melt down during catch-up — vent before leaving the game idle.
controls.chronometer: The Chronometer upgrade (and Improved Chronometers research) speeds up reactor ticks so you earn faster. Faster ticks also mean heat builds faster — scale cooling with output.

layouts.title: Layouts & Blueprint Planning
layouts.content:
Copy layout (reactor toolbar) exports your grid as text you can share or save.
Paste / Import loads a layout from clipboard or file; My Layouts can store favorites and load them later.
Blueprint mode (plan toggle) lets you draft changes without spending money. The HUD shows power, heat balance, and stability — use Apply to commit or Clear to discard the draft.

upgrades.general: Upgrades provide permanent improvements to your reactor's capabilities.
upgrades.experimental: Experimental upgrades cost Exotic Particles (EP) and persist through reboots.

prestige.title: Prestige & Research
prestige.content:
Wait until ~51 EP before your first reboot. The first tier of permanent research costs 50 EP per upgrade — rebooting too early leaves you unable to buy anything meaningful.

Weave EP (banked on Prestige reboot) uses the minimum of total power produced and total heat dissipated this run, divided by 1,000,000 (Weave Quantum). High power without matching cooling caps your EP gain.

Prestige resets money, grid parts, and regular upgrades but keeps EP and experimental research.
Refund (full reset) also wipes experimental research and refunds all EP.

failureFlavor.saturation: Core approaching thermal limit. Vent or throttle before efficiency collapses.
failureFlavor.repulsion: Hull integrity under stress. Structural decay has begun.
failureFlavor.fragmentation: Components failing. Emergency layout changes may be too late.
failureFlavor.criticality: Thermal runaway imminent. Meltdown unless heat is removed immediately.
failureFlavor.meltdown: Catastrophic failure. Reset the reactor to continue.
